content.en:
"So many treasures of annihilation!"

Ye Tian was very excited when he saw this dense treasure of annihilation.

Moreover, there are many high-level Silence Extinguishing Treasures, as well as top-level Silence Extinguishing Treasures, which are far more powerful than the effect of Silence Crystal.

"Let's fuse those ancestors of the Silent Annihilation Clan first, once the fusion is successful, there may be unexpected situations!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, in the following days, Ye Tian began to fuse these ancestral endowments, and let the same kind of ancestral endowments continue to fuse together.

An ancestral endowment, fusion!

Ten ancestral endowments, fusion!

Hundred ancestors are fused, fusion!

......

Ye Tian copied all the ancestral endowments of many Silent Annihilation Clans, and now these ancestral endowments have all been fused, although it will take many years, Ye Tian obviously senses that the several ancestral endowments that he has copied and fused are constantly transforming and strengthening.

Strength Ancestral Endowment!

Speed Ancestor!

Defend the ancestors!

Annihilation!

Time Ancestor!

These five ancestors are all getting stronger at an incredible speed.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of millions of years had passed, but Ye Tian had spent a long time in the Time Acceleration Formation.

In the end, when these ancestral endowments were almost all fused, Ye Tian's power ancestral endowments ushered in a qualitative change.

Bang!!!!!

In the depths of his soul, Ye Tian's power ancestor imprint seemed to be evolving into a world, a world that belonged to the strength talent.

After a long time, this miniature world was born.

"Ultimate Ancestral Fu!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With the birth of this miniature power ancestral endowment world, his power ancestral endowment has turned into the ultimate ancestral endowment, although it is still an ancestral endowment, but it has reached the ultimate extreme of ancestral endowment, which can be regarded as another ancestral endowment level.

Moreover, this ultimate ancestral endowment is different from ordinary ancestral endowments, even if ordinary ancestral endowments are opened, at most they will exert a power comparable to that of holy techniques, and if they cannot be used, they will be of little use.

It's like the Silent Annihilation Clan, although all of them have ancestral endowments, but their comprehension is very poor, so they can't create ancestral skills, they can only simply urge ancestral endowments to attack, so they can exert the power of holy skills at most, otherwise they won't be destroyed by the ancestors.

However, the Ultimate Ancestral Fu can exert a power that surpasses the Ancestral Technique, but it is only the power of a single blow.

For example, the Ultimate Power Ancestral Fu, once it erupts, it is equivalent to mobilizing the power of the entire Ultimate Power Ancestral Fu World to carry out an explosive blow, which is extremely terrifying.

But for Ye Tian, with the Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowment, he could easily cultivate a Gate Power Ancestral Technique to the consummation realm.

Even in the future, he still hopes to deduce the Strength Ancestral Technique to the level of the Ultimate Ancestral Technique, then maybe he will be able to kill the Ancestor by leapfrogging.

"Let's fuse the other Ultimate Ancestral Endowments one by one!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With the continuous fusion, the Ultimate Defense Ancestor, the Ultimate Speed Ancestor, the Ultimate Silence Annihilation Ancestor, and the Ultimate Time Ancestor were born one by one.

Other than that.

After Ye Tian found that his Silent Annihilation Clan Fu had reached the ultimate level, he refined the Silent Annihilation Treasure faster, and the utilization rate was even higher, almost reaching the level of 100% utilization.

With his Ultimate Silent Annihilation Ancestral Endowment, plus those Silent Annihilation Treasures obtained, he was enough to advance his cultivation to the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, which was also the limit that he could be promoted.

For him, it is impossible to take the half-step ancestor route, so the next step is the ancestor, and if he wants to become an ancestor, he doesn't know how many years it will take, I am afraid it will be a long time.

After all, he doesn't have a clue right now.

"Let's improve our cultivation first, and we'll talk about it later!"

Ye Tian continued his retreat and began to refine the massive treasure of annihilation.

One by one, the treasures of extinction were refined by Ye Tian, making Ye Tian's cultivation continue to improve.

100 million years!

A billion years!

In the blink of an eye, three billion years have passed.

For the Superior Domain Ancestors, this amount of time is really nothing, and for the Ancestors, it is just a nap time.

At this time, under the accumulation and refining of the Silent Treasures, Ye Tian finally raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and his cultivation reached the point where he could not advance.

More importantly, Ye Tian had now begun to use the Silent Destruction Treasure to refine the ancestral body.

The Silent Annihilation Treasure also has an effect on refining the ancestral body, but he has been improving his cultivation and has given up the refining of the ancestral body, so he can now continue to use the Silent Annihilation Treasure to refine the ancestral body.

For a long time, Ye Tian's ancestral body was in the stage of small success.

Of course.

The ancestral body can improve the realm through derivation and complete rapid cultivation, but if there is a resource like the Treasure of Silence, the progress will naturally be faster.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian cooperated synchronously with the copy body, copying the body to evolve the ancestral body, while the main body used the Silent Treasure to refine the ancestral body, which could advance the ancestral body to the Dacheng realm faster.

In the blink of an eye, another billion years have passed.

However, Ye Tian's Silent Annihilation Treasure was exhausted, and his ancestral body had only deduced to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, which was still one step away from the realm of Dacheng, but this step was very difficult to cross.

"Enough, the strength has been improved to this point, and it is already very fast!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian exchanged some strength, defense, speed, and time holy skills from the battle gate.

Then, he began to cultivate these holy techniques, easily elevating these holy techniques to the ancestral skills, and easily cultivating these ancestral techniques to the consummation realm.

In fact, no matter how much he cultivated his ancestral skills, there was no big improvement for Ye Tian.

The more ancestral skills that can be cultivated, the deeper the understanding of this Dao will be, which will help Ye Tian to deduce the ancestral skills to the ultimate ancestral skills in the future.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai was so crazy about cultivating the Holy Technique and Ancestral Technique, instead of wasting time.

On this day, a message came from the battle gate, which made Ye Tian break off the idea of continuing the retreat.

"That's ...... so"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At this moment, he finally understood why the ancestors had invaded the Silent Extinction Clan so suddenly, and destroyed the Silent Extinction Clan.

Because, the third dark holy land in the Dark Forbidden Realm is about to be born.

"Sure enough, the Silent Annihilation Clan is just a leek, and the third Dark Holy Land is about to be born, and this kind of thing is many times more important than the Silent Annihilation Clan, so the ancestors don't want to continue to guard the border of the Silent Annihilation Clan, so they take action to exterminate the Silent Annihilation Clan!

Ye Tian muttered.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of one thing, where was the third Dark Holy Land?

"Could it be that the Dao Mountain Realm where I am located is the third Dark Holy Land?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"That's not right!" Ye Tian shook his head, "The Dark Holy Land is a place similar to the Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Sacred Land, it is a natural birth, a treasure land derived from the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the Daoshan Realm was created by me using the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, it can't be the third Dark Holy Land." However, it is possible that the Daoshan Realm will develop into a fourth Dark Sanctuary in the future, but it will take a long time. "

When he thought about it, he breathed a sigh of relief.

Otherwise, the Dao Mountain Realm was really the third Dark Holy Land, and he would have to move, otherwise he wouldn't be able to withstand the tremendous pressure.
